prompt_text:
### Demographics: 55-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 4 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: No DKA/HHS symptoms; no recent hypoglycemia episodes; no acute complaints

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3a (45-59)
Heart failure: HFimpEF (NYHA Class II)
ASCVD: Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history; Coronary artery disease (History of CABG)
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3a (45-59); HF: HFimpEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD: Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history; MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (older sister)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 1 years ago; 5 cigarettes/day for 10 years; ~2.5 pack-years); Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Dulaglutide 1.5mg once weekly; Quetiapine (150 mg nightly), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 85.4 kg; Height 182.3 cm; BMI 25.7 kg/m²; Blood pressure 112/76 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.8%; 9 months ago 7.6%; 6 months ago 8.0%; 3 months ago 7.9%; current 7.9%), FPG (12 months ago 186mg/dL; 9 months ago 174mg/dL; 6 months ago 215mg/dL; 3 months ago 177mg/dL; current 162mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 87.3kg; 9 months ago 86.1kg; 6 months ago 83.8kg; 3 months ago 82.7kg; current 85.4kg), Height (12 months ago 182.3cm; 9 months ago 182.3cm; 6 months ago 182.3cm; 3 months ago 182.3cm; current 182.3cm), BMI (12 months ago 26.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 26.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 25.0kg/m²; current 25.7kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 120mmHg; 9 months ago 120mmHg; 6 months ago 120mmHg; 3 months ago 120mmHg; current 112mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 72mmHg; 9 months ago 73mmHg; 6 months ago 75mmHg; 3 months ago 76mmHg; current 76mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 33U/L; 9 months ago 32U/L; 6 months ago 30U/L; 3 months ago 29U/L; current 35U/L), AST (12 months ago 24U/L; 9 months ago 16U/L; 6 months ago 14U/L; 3 months ago 24U/L; current 20U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.1mg/dL; current 1.1mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 57mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 60mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 57mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 56mL/min/1.73m²; current 56mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 53mg/g; 9 months ago 76mg/g; 6 months ago 62mg/g; 3 months ago 91mg/g; current 80mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 100mg/dL; 9 months ago 97mg/dL; 6 months ago 100mg/dL; 3 months ago 96mg/dL; current 98mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 42mg/dL; 9 months ago 46mg/dL; 6 months ago 43mg/dL; 3 months ago 46mg/dL; current 44mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 143mg/dL; 9 months ago 157mg/dL; 6 months ago 159mg/dL; 3 months ago 142mg/dL; current 151mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 13.0g/dL; 6 months ago 13.8g/dL; 3 months ago 14.0g/dL; current 13.1g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
